authority-bindings.additional-constraints: attester must match the practitioner declared on the workspace shape configuration.

roles.description: The accountable principal of the workspace; the human actor whose authorship + attestation is preserved.
Actor that produces a draft claim; typically an agent-actor.
Actor that attests a claim; typically the practitioner.
Actor that reviews a claim or work-unit.

hooks.name: pre-claim-attest
hooks.purpose: Sparring / challenge before attestation fires; lets shape policy intervene in claim-finalization flow.

hooks.name: post-event-emit
hooks.purpose: Emit-time check on every event for shape policy compliance.
